description_long: This is a white chest of drawers with four spacious drawers, each adorned with ornate gold and white handles. The front face features decorative carved patterns, adding a touch of elegance to the otherwise modern and clean design. The top surface is extended with raised side and back panels, forming a tray-like area, possibly for changing or organizing items. The sides and back are plain and smooth, lacking any decorative features or handles. The chest stands on short, sturdy feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with metal handles and internal hardware.
description: A white chest of drawers with four ornate-handled drawers and a raised tray-like top, featuring decorative carved patterns on the front.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a plain, smooth white back panel with no handles or decorations.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a flat, undecorated white surface and the raised tray structure on top.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting four drawers with gold and white ornate handles and decorative carved patterns.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing a plain white surface and the raised tray structure.
